text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has been working hard during
summer camp. One day, when we're about to
finish our morning training session and grab some
lunch...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Wait! I can keep going!
choice_data_list: It's about time you take a break...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's okay... I'm fine. Actually—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A new record. But five seconds short of my ideal
time... Resuming training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please... just let me do one more lap.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please... just let me do one more lap.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, Rice Shower runs off.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! There she goes!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aw, maaan! I really wanted to talk to her, too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Haru Urara... She's a good-natured girl adored
by everyone. She's also one of Rice Shower's
pals.)
choice_data_list:
Is there something you want to talk to Rice
about?

Is there something you want to talk to Rice
about?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yep! There's soooo much I wanna tell her!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So couldja let me know when she's back? Just
scream my name, and I'll come running!
choice_data_list: She'll be back in no time.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Then I'll just wait here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmm-hm-hmmm! ♪ Urara, la la la! ♪
choice_data_list: So... what do you want to talk to her about?
So... what do you want to talk to her about?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What else? I'm gonna ask her to have lunch with
me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And then I wanna praise her for all her hard work!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's talking about how cool she is right
now, working her butt off!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Everyone's rooting for her!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why are you thanking me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Eh, whatever! You're welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and I continue to wait for Rice
Shower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Urara?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heyo, Rice! Let's go eat! ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A-all three of us?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! They've got fried carrots, yakisoba,
stamina rice bowls, and even huge candy apples!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehe! What are you gonna start with, Rice? I'm
going for some carrot ice cream! ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, I can't decide... What should I get, Big
Brother?
choice_data_list: The mega meat and rice bowl!
Let's go for one of those huge candy apples!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, I can't decide... What should I get, Big
Sister?
choice_data_list: The mega meat and rice bowl!
Let's go for one of those huge candy apples!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Growwwl...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Gyah! Oh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-how did you know that I'm so hungry?
choice_data_list: I saw how hard you trained today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-how did you know that I'm so hungry?
choice_data_list: I saw how hard you trained today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe. I see. You are always watching over me, after all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe. I see. You are always watching over me, after all.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! Me too, me too! I watch you all the time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's right... Thank you, Urara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the remainder of lunch in pleasant
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whoa... a candy apple! Can I really have one?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I usually think of them as a special
reward.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My mom would always get me one after a race or
a hard test.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You deserve, like, a hundred!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...R-really?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Of course! You're working so, so, sooooo hard!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Heheh. Thank you. Both of you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Heheh. Thank you. Both of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We spend the remainder of lunch in pleasant
conversation.
